title: Rare Ice Unofficial Port
description: Ports the rare ice mod to 1.21, currently in dev
body:
## About
### Rare Ice
- [Origin mod here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/rare-ice)
- This fabric mod ports the rare ice mod into 1.21.
- Adds rare ice into the world, but can you find them all?

### Note
- This mod is currently in dev. (I did rewrite the nbt serialize logic) 
- Render & Worldgen are not identical to the original one.
- No forge port planned
